title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FreshToHome - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, FreshToHome in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
